other_observers: Janeal Thompson, Dotti Russell, Duane Nelson were all here for part of the time;
specific_location: farmyard 5 miles south of Lamar and about a quarter mile to the west
description: -very similar to a Pine Siskin in markings across back and wings and in size  -definite red patch on top of crown -whitish breast with small black chin patchBehaviors: -was present with Pine Siskins and fed and behaved much as they did -did not always fly away with Siskins when they were spookedCall: silentPlumage: adult
